title: Laboratory trend review

red_flags.text: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.
red_flags.rationale: Defines chronic-disease laboratory-monitoring purpose and telehealth limits; it does not validate arbitrary trend review.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21

investigations.text: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.
investigations.rationale: Relevant to clinician documentation of condition-linked monitoring; it cannot generate tests or interpret values.
investigations.evidence_extract: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21

treatment_and_management.text: Includes hypothyroidism, hyperthyroidism, and hypercholesterolaemia/hyperlipidaemia among the listed chronic conditions.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Relevant only when a listed chronic condition is clinician established.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Includes hypothyroidism, hyperthyroidism, and hypercholesterolaemia/hyperlipidaemia among the listed chronic conditions.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Analyte, indication, values, dates, reference intervals, chronic condition, medicine and clinical context are unspecified.
No trend interpretation, diagnosis, test order, monitoring interval or treatment change is supported.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
